mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM attendance WHERE mem_no = #{memNo} AND TRUNC(att_date) = TRUNC(SYSDATE)
SELECT TRUNC(att_date) FROM attendance WHERE mem_no = #{memNo} AND TRUNC(att_date) >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) - 6 ORDER BY att_date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO attendance (mem_no, att_date) VALUES (#{memNo}, TRUNC(SYSDATE))
